0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"System Design"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"High-level system architecture and component interactions."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Component Diagram"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"graph LR\nsubgraph Client[\"Client Layer\"]\nA[Agent Application]\nH[Hermes Framework]\nend"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"subgraph API[\"API Layer\"]\nP[Python SDK]\nT[Tool Schema]\nend"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"subgraph Core[\"Core Engine\"]\nM[Mnemosyne class]\nR1[BeamMemory]\nS[Sleep]\nI[SQLite + sqlite-vec + FTS5]\nend"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"subgraph Storage[\"Storage Layer\"]\nSQLite[(SQLite DB)]\nV[Vector Index]\nF[FTS5 Index]\nend"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"A --> P\nH --> T\nP --> M\nT --> M\nM --> R1\nM --> S\nR1 --> I\nS --> I\nI --> SQLite\nI --> V\nI --> F"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"style Core fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\nstyle Storage fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Core Components"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Mnemosyne class"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Central orchestrator handling all CRUD operations. Routes operations to appropriate memory tiers and manages cross-tier consistency."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"BeamMemory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search coordinator. Dispatches queries to vector and text indices, then fuses results using configurable scoring weights."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Sleep"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["On-demand consolidator triggered by calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}],". Groups older Working Memory entries by source, summarizes via LLM or AAAK, promotes to Episodic Memory, and evicts the originals."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"SQLite + sqlite-vec + FTS5"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Maintains all database indices: vector embeddings (via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],", int8 quantized 384-dim vectors) and FTS5 full-text search tables."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Technology Stack"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Layer"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Technology"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Database"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite 3.45+"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Primary storage"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vectors"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector similarity search"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Text"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full-text search"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 via fastembed"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"384-dim text-to-vector"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scaling Considerations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is designed for single-node deployments:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],": SQLite-backed with configurable max (default 10,000 items, 24h TTL)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],": SQLite with sqlite-vec extension for vector search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TripleStore (Knowledge Graph)"}],": Subject-predicate-object triples stored in SQLite (via separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["For multi-agent deployments, each agent maintains its own database instance. Built-in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," provides incremental synchronization with checkpointing — use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to()"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from()"}]," for bidirectional sync between instances."]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],"$L5"]}]}]],["$L6"],"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"a7Z8buxtE-LVtBntTgeEr"}
5:["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Not a Distributed System"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not support distributed or clustered deployments. For high-availability requirements, use SQLite replication (Litestream) or export/import between instances."}]}]]}]
